title: More RPG Classes - Skill Tree
description: RPG Series Skill Tree Add-On for the More RPG Classes!
body:

 [![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/MRPG-SkillTree-Add-On)




***

# 📂 Installation

## **🚨Required Mods**

*   More RPG Library
*   Archers Expansion (More RPG Classes)
*   Berserker (More RPG Classes)
*   Elemental Wizards (More RPG Classes)
*   Forcemaster (More RPG Classes)
*   Skill Tree (RPG Series) + all Dependencies

# 🌴 Features

This Mod brings the More RPG Classes to the RPG-Series Skill Tree! With the new modifiers and passives you can specialise your class further!

# 🛠️Configuration

For Modpack-Devs I created the **_config\\mrpgc\_skill\_tree\\tweaks.json_** config. You can disable my skill-tree re-arrangement changes, to create your own layout with my skill nodes. Just turn the **"disable\_mrpgc\_skilltree\_changes"** to false.

Feel free to use this Mod in your Modpack, Video etc. If you want to give feedback about the mod or report bugs, feel free to join my Discord Server! :)
